# Implement bounded-context work

Read first:
- [AGENTS](../../AGENTS.md)
- [Architecture rules](../../.agent/rules/architecture_rules.md)
- [Bounded contexts](../../.agent/context/bounded_contexts.md)
- [Module map](../../.agent/context/module_map.md)
- [Critical flows](../../.agent/context/critical_flows.md)

Task:
- Identify the target bounded context.
- State the use case / flow being changed.
- List invariants that must remain true.
- Describe the transaction boundary.
- Describe audit and sync impact.
- Propose implementation steps and tests.
- Flag any architecture drift before generating code.
